name: hoc/notification-center
description: A composite notification-bell popover HOC that groups unread/read notifications into tabbed categories, shows timestamps, icons, and action buttons, and marks items as read. Composed of Popover, Tabs, Badge, Button, Separator, and IconBell primitives with full i18n support via ConfigProvider. Provides NotificationCenter, NotificationList, NotificationItem, and related sub-components with category grouping and empty-state handling.
useCases: SaaS application headers with a bell icon that opens a tabbed notification drawer
Social-media platforms showing likes, mentions, follows, and system alerts in grouped tabs
Project-management tools notifying users of task assignments, due-date reminders, and comments
E-commerce order-tracking notifications for shipping, delivery, and return status updates
usage: import { NotificationCenter, type NotificationCenterProps, type NotificationItem, type NotificationCategory } from "shadcn-solid-components/hoc/notification-center"
